# vendor/jasmine-focused

Files taken from [`pulsar-edit/jasmine-focused`](https://github.com/pulsar-edit/jasmine-focused).

Since this file is compiled from CoffeeScript during publication, and has sufficient
requires of it's own, we will bake it right into this repository and install as a dependency
for our `pulsar-jasmine1-test-runner`. But keeping it local will allow future simplifications
much more easily.

But, in an ideal future, we could simple only have the `jasmine-focused.js` file here,
removing duplicated dependencies and the CoffeeScript.
